name: PCI DSS
fullName: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard v4.0.1
description: PCI DSS is the payment card data security standard designed to protect cardholder data and reduce risk across payment environments.

categories.name: Secure Network and Systems
categories.description: Build and maintain secure network and system configurations.

subcategories.name: Network Boundary Protection
subcategories.description: Protect cardholder data environments with network controls.

requirements.name: Boundary control configuration
requirements.description: Configure and maintain boundary controls to restrict unauthorized traffic.
requirements.verification: Review firewall/ACL rules and change records

requirements.name: Segmentation and isolation
requirements.description: Isolate the cardholder data environment from other network zones.
requirements.verification: Review segmentation design and connectivity test results

requirements.name: Traffic rule reviews
requirements.description: Review inbound/outbound rules periodically and remove stale entries.
requirements.verification: Review rule review cadence and baseline

subcategories.name: System Hardening
subcategories.description: Remove insecure defaults and harden systems.

requirements.name: Default setting cleanup
requirements.description: Change default passwords/settings and remove unnecessary services.
requirements.verification: Review hardening baseline and validation checks

requirements.name: Security baselines
requirements.description: Define and enforce hardened baselines for hosts and containers.
requirements.verification: Review baseline policy and automation results

requirements.name: Continuous compliance monitoring
requirements.description: Continuously detect baseline drift and trigger remediation.
requirements.verification: Review compliance alerts and remediation tickets

categories.name: Protect Cardholder Data
categories.description: Protect cardholder data at rest and in transit.

subcategories.name: Data at Rest Protection
subcategories.description: Apply strong controls for stored cardholder data.

requirements.name: Data minimization
requirements.description: Retain only the minimum cardholder data necessary for business purposes.
requirements.verification: Review data retention policy and purge logs

requirements.name: Encryption and masking
requirements.description: Use strong encryption, truncation, or masking for sensitive data fields.
requirements.verification: Review key management and sample datasets

requirements.name: Key lifecycle management
requirements.description: Manage keys through secure generation, storage, rotation, and retirement.
requirements.verification: Review KMS settings and rotation evidence

subcategories.name: Data in Transit Protection
subcategories.description: Protect sensitive data over open/public networks.

requirements.name: Secure transport protocols
requirements.description: Use strong cryptographic protocols for transmission security.
requirements.verification: Review TLS configurations and certificate health

requirements.name: Disable weak protocols
requirements.description: Disable weak protocols and deprecated cipher suites.
requirements.verification: Review scan findings and remediation records

requirements.name: End-to-end protection
requirements.description: Implement end-to-end encryption or equivalent controls in critical payment paths.

categories.name: Monitor and Test
categories.description: Continuously monitor access and validate security controls.

subcategories.name: Logging and Monitoring
subcategories.description: Log and review critical security events.

requirements.name: Comprehensive logging
requirements.description: Capture logs for critical systems and access events.
requirements.verification: Review log policy and sample records

requirements.name: Centralized monitoring
requirements.description: Aggregate logs and alert on suspicious behaviors.
requirements.verification: Review SIEM rules and alert handling

requirements.name: Log integrity protection
requirements.description: Protect logs from tampering and preserve forensic chain-of-custody.
requirements.verification: Review integrity controls and archival policy

subcategories.name: Vulnerability and Security Testing
subcategories.description: Use scanning, penetration testing, and remediation workflows.

requirements.name: Periodic vulnerability scanning
requirements.description: Run internal and external vulnerability scans on a defined schedule.

requirements.name: Penetration testing
requirements.description: Perform recurring penetration tests and validate fixes.
requirements.verification: Review penetration test reports and retest results

requirements.name: Continuous control validation
requirements.description: Continuously validate the effectiveness of critical security controls.
requirements.verification: Review control validation dashboards and findings
